title: tecoma meonantha
intro: Tecoma meonantha, also known as Yellow Bells, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Bignoniaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Tecoma meonantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive problems. The herbal preparation of Yellow Bells typically involves drying and crushing the leaves and flowers, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
